title: bidens bigelovii
intro: Bidens bigelovii, also known as Bigelow's beggar-ticks, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Bidens bigelovii is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and folk medicine.
